task_description: Refactor MK's conversation architecture to LLM-first with offline fallback. Wire MKCloudLLM and MKLLMEngine into the main system, replace the Genesis->Prometheus->CXN->MCE waterfall with LLM-first (local then cloud) using RAG context from pattern_graph and conversation history from brainMemory. Keep Genesis as offline-only fallback.

verification.summary: Build compiles clean (11 pre-existing warnings, 0 errors). All 47 tests pass with 357 assertions. New tests cover LLM initialization, fallback logic, RAG context assembly, and brain memory context string.
